title: Infosys Renews and Expands Digital Innovation Partnership With MSG Family of Companies
detailed_summary: Infosys announced an extension and expansion of its partnership with the Madison Square Garden Family of Companies. Infosys remains the Official Digital Innovation Partner across key MSG properties, including the New York Knicks, New York Rangers, Madison Square Garden and MSG Networks, and the Theater at Madison Square Garden has been renamed the Infosys Theater at Madison Square Garden.

key_facts.fact: Infosys, Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp., Madison Square Garden Sports Corp. and Sphere Entertainment Co. announced an extension of their partnership.
Infosys continues as the Official Digital Innovation Partner across key MSG properties, including the New York Knicks, New York Rangers, Madison Square Garden and MSG Networks.
The Theater at Madison Square Garden has been renamed the Infosys Theater at Madison Square Garden.

partnerships_or_deals.counterparty: Madison Square Garden Family of Companies
partnerships_or_deals.description: Infosys renewed and expanded its partnership, remaining the Official Digital Innovation Partner across key MSG properties and becoming the entitlement partner of the Infosys Theater at Madison Square Garden.

important_text_spans.text: The extension reinforces Infosys' role as the Official Digital Innovation Partner across key properties within the MSG Family of Companies, including the New York Knicks, New York Rangers, Madison Square Garden and MSG Networks.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the continued scope of the partnership.

important_text_spans.text: the Theater at Madison Square Garden has been renamed the Infosys Theater at Madison Square Garden.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the naming-rights element of the expanded partnership.

search_keywords: Infosys Theater at Madison Square Garden
sample_questions: What did Infosys announce with the Madison Square Garden Family of Companies in February 2026?

processing_notes: Marked non-material because the document is primarily a sponsorship and branding partnership announcement with no disclosed financial value, revenue impact, guidance, or material operating metrics.
